title: RPN - Gameplay
body:
A mod for the RoleplayNet Minecraft Server, to bind together various mods and add fun miscellaneous utilities, gadgets and tweaks.

# Features:

*   various kinds of foods and pharmaceuticals
*   industrial processes to create those
*   custom recipes, including compatibility with Meds and Herbs and Farmer's Delight
*   custom brews and recipes for [Brewery Forgified](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/brewery-forgified)
*   bigger books with formatting options, by wrapping a partial BiblioCraft port

It is mainly made for playing on our server, but can be used on its own as well.

You can join us here: \[GERMAN\] [https://discord.gg/56sARCDrvt](https://discord.gg/56sARCDrvt)



**You may use this mod in modpacks and on servers without first asking me for permission, or even crediting me, as long as you do not pretend that you made this mod and do not ask for payment in exchange for access to your modpack. Credit is appreciated, tho :3**
